example: The regional managers will convene in Taipei for the annual strategy session.
exampleTrans: 各區經理將齊聚台北召開年度策略會議。

example: The chairperson adjourned the meeting until further data becomes available.
exampleTrans: 主席宣布休會，待取得更多數據後再續開。

example: The outdoor product launch was postponed because of the approaching typhoon.
exampleTrans: 由於颱風逼近，戶外產品發表會延期舉行。

example: Ms. Lin will preside over the shareholders meeting this year.
exampleTrans: 林女士今年將主持股東會議。

example: The committee reached a unanimous decision to approve the budget.
exampleTrans: 委員會一致決議通過該預算。

example: After two hours of discussion, the team finally reached a consensus on pricing.
exampleTrans: 經過兩小時討論，團隊終於在定價上達成共識。

example: The directors deliberated for days before choosing a new supplier.
exampleTrans: 董事們商議數日後才選定新供應商。

example: An outside consultant was hired to facilitate the strategy workshop.
exampleTrans: 公司聘請外部顧問來引導這場策略工作坊。

example: The moderator kept the panel discussion on schedule.
exampleTrans: 主持人讓座談討論準時進行。

example: Each panelist was given five minutes to share industry insights.
exampleTrans: 每位與談人有五分鐘分享產業見解。

example: The keynote will be delivered by the founder of a leading tech company.
exampleTrans: 主題演講將由一家頂尖科技公司的創辦人主講。

example: The speaker stepped up to the podium and greeted the audience.
exampleTrans: 講者走上講台向聽眾致意。

example: Please refer to page three of the handout for the sales figures.
exampleTrans: 銷售數字請參閱講義第三頁。

example: The projector in Conference Room B needs to be repaired before the demo.
exampleTrans: B 會議室的投影機需要在展示前修好。

example: The manager outlined the marketing strategy in the first slide.
exampleTrans: 經理在第一張投影片中概述了行銷策略。

example: Could you summarize the key findings for those who missed the meeting?
exampleTrans: 可以為錯過會議的同仁總結重點發現嗎？

example: A brief recap of last quarter's results will open the presentation.
exampleTrans: 簡報將以上一季業績的重點回顧開場。

example: Could you clarify which model you would like to exchange?
exampleTrans: 您能說明清楚想要更換哪一個型號嗎？

example: Could you elaborate on how the new system will reduce costs?
exampleTrans: 可以詳細說明新系統將如何降低成本嗎？

example: The director emphasized the importance of meeting customer expectations.
exampleTrans: 總監強調滿足顧客期望的重要性。

example: The chart illustrates how our market share has grown since January.
exampleTrans: 這張圖表說明了我們的市占率自一月以來的成長。

example: The engineer will demonstrate the new software during the client meeting.
exampleTrans: 工程師將在客戶會議中示範新軟體。

example: Her persuasive presentation convinced the client to double the order.
exampleTrans: 她具說服力的簡報讓客戶決定將訂單加倍。

example: Keep your slides concise so the audience can grasp the main points quickly.
exampleTrans: 投影片要簡潔，讓聽眾能快速掌握重點。

example: If there are no objections, we will proceed with the revised schedule.
exampleTrans: 如果沒有異議，我們就照修訂後的時程進行。

example: The design team submitted a proposal for the new company website.
exampleTrans: 設計團隊提交了新公司網站的提案。

example: The board passed a resolution to open two more overseas offices.
exampleTrans: 董事會通過決議，再增設兩個海外辦公室。

example: The vote was delayed because the meeting lacked a quorum.
exampleTrans: 由於會議未達法定人數，表決因此延後。

example: Each attendee will receive a badge and a program at the entrance.
exampleTrans: 每位與會者將在入口處領取識別證和議程表。

example: Participants are encouraged to ask questions at the end of each session.
exampleTrans: 鼓勵參與者在每個場次結束時提問。

example: The marketing team met to brainstorm ideas for the holiday campaign.
exampleTrans: 行銷團隊開會腦力激盪節慶活動的點子。

example: A short briefing on safety procedures will be held before the factory tour.
exampleTrans: 工廠參觀前將舉行一場簡短的安全程序說明會。

example: We had to reschedule the site visit after the client's flight was canceled.
exampleTrans: 客戶的航班取消後，我們不得不重新安排實地參訪的時間。

example: The preliminary results of the survey will be presented on Friday.
exampleTrans: 調查的初步結果將於週五發表。

example: Details of the budget will be finalized in subsequent meetings.
exampleTrans: 預算細節將在後續會議中定案。

example: The speaker concluded her talk with a summary of next steps.
exampleTrans: 講者以後續步驟的摘要為演講作結。

example: The report highlights three areas where costs can be reduced.
exampleTrans: 這份報告突顯了三個可以降低成本的領域。

example: The CFO will address the investors' concerns at the annual meeting.
exampleTrans: 財務長將在年度會議上回應投資人的疑慮。

example: The presenter adjusted her tone to suit an international audience.
exampleTrans: 簡報者調整語氣以配合國際聽眾。

example: The annual kickoff meeting will be held in the main auditorium.
exampleTrans: 年度啟動會議將在大禮堂舉行。

example: Refreshments will be served in the foyer during the mid-morning break.
exampleTrans: 上午中場休息時間將在門廳供應茶點。

example: The Tokyo office will join the quarterly review via teleconference.
exampleTrans: 東京辦公室將透過視訊會議參加季度檢討。

example: The trainer used interactive polls to keep the workshop engaging.
exampleTrans: 講師使用互動式投票讓工作坊保持吸引力。

example: The seminar will commence promptly at nine in the morning.
exampleTrans: 研討會將於早上九點準時開始。

example: The panel decided to defer the vote until all members were present.
exampleTrans: 小組決定將表決延後，直到所有成員到齊。

example: Neither party may transfer the contract without the written consent of the other.
exampleTrans: 未經對方書面同意，任一方均不得轉讓本合約。

example: There was little dissent when the new policy was put to a vote.
exampleTrans: 新政策付諸表決時幾乎沒有反對意見。

example: The first slide gives an overview of the project milestones.
exampleTrans: 第一張投影片呈現專案里程碑的概觀。

example: A full transcript of the earnings call will be posted on our website.
exampleTrans: 法說會的完整逐字稿將公布在我們的網站上。

example: The review session produced constructive feedback on the prototype.
exampleTrans: 檢討會議為原型產品帶來了有建設性的回饋。

example: Three candidates have been invited for a second interview.
exampleTrans: 三位應徵者獲邀參加第二次面試。

example: The receptionist said there were no vacancies until after the holiday weekend.
exampleTrans: 櫃檯人員表示，連假週末結束前都沒有空房。

example: A master's degree is a preferred qualification for this position.
exampleTrans: 碩士學位是這個職位的優先考量條件。

example: Please attach copies of your professional credentials to the application.
exampleTrans: 請在申請文件中附上專業證書影本。

example: Purchases over fifty dollars are eligible for free gift wrapping.
exampleTrans: 消費滿五十美元即可享有免費禮品包裝。

example: New hires must complete a three-month probation before becoming permanent staff.
exampleTrans: 新進人員須完成三個月試用期才能成為正式員工。

example: The orientation for new employees covers company policies and benefits.
exampleTrans: 新員工訓練涵蓋公司政策與福利。

example: Our onboarding program pairs every new hire with an experienced buddy.
exampleTrans: 我們的到職培訓計畫為每位新人配對一位資深夥伴。

example: Nearly half of our new clients come from referrals by existing customers.
exampleTrans: 我們近半數的新客戶來自既有顧客的轉介。

example: Improving customer retention is cheaper than acquiring new buyers.
exampleTrans: 提升顧客留存率比開發新買家更省成本。

example: Annual turnover rose by fifteen percent after the new product line was introduced.
exampleTrans: 新產品線推出後，年營業額成長了百分之十五。

example: Laid-off workers received a severance package equal to three months' pay.
exampleTrans: 被資遣的員工獲得相當於三個月薪資的遣散方案。

example: The compensation package includes a base salary and annual bonuses.
exampleTrans: 薪酬方案包含底薪與年度獎金。

example: The company contributes six percent of each salary to the pension fund.
exampleTrans: 公司提撥每人薪資的百分之六到退休基金。

example: Annual performance appraisals will be conducted throughout December.
exampleTrans: 年度績效考核將於十二月期間進行。

example: Supervisors assess each intern's progress at the end of the program.
exampleTrans: 主管會在計畫結束時評估每位實習生的進展。

example: We are seeking a competent administrator to manage the branch office.
exampleTrans: 我們正在尋找一位能勝任的行政人員來管理分公司。

example: Applicants must be proficient in both English and spreadsheet software.
exampleTrans: 應徵者必須精通英語與試算表軟體。

example: Her expertise in data analysis made her the ideal candidate.
exampleTrans: 她在數據分析方面的專業使她成為理想人選。

example: Each trainee is assigned a mentor from the senior management team.
exampleTrans: 每位受訓者都會被指派一位來自高階管理團隊的導師。

example: The summer internship offers hands-on experience in product development.
exampleTrans: 暑期實習提供產品開發的實務經驗。

example: During her tenure as HR director, employee satisfaction rose sharply.
exampleTrans: 在她擔任人資總監期間，員工滿意度大幅上升。

example: Repeated safety violations can result in immediate dismissal.
exampleTrans: 屢次違反安全規定可能導致立即解僱。

example: The factory announced layoffs after losing its largest contract.
exampleTrans: 工廠在失去最大合約後宣布裁員。

example: He submitted his resignation after accepting an offer from a competitor.
exampleTrans: 他在接受競爭對手的聘書後遞出辭呈。

example: A farewell party was held to celebrate the manager's retirement.
exampleTrans: 公司舉辦歡送會慶祝經理退休。

example: Candidates will take an aptitude test to measure problem-solving skills.
exampleTrans: 應徵者將接受性向測驗，以評量解決問題的能力。

example: The intern showed great initiative by redesigning the filing system.
exampleTrans: 這位實習生主動重新設計歸檔系統，展現極佳的積極性。

example: We value dedicated employees who consistently exceed expectations.
exampleTrans: 我們重視持續超越期望、盡職投入的員工。

meaning: 多才多藝的；用途廣泛的
example: The role requires a versatile professional who can handle both design and sales.
exampleTrans: 這個職位需要能同時處理設計與業務、多才多藝的專業人才。

example: Nearly half of the plant's workforce has completed the advanced safety training.
exampleTrans: 工廠近半數員工已完成進階安全訓練。

example: All personnel must update their emergency contact information by Friday.
exampleTrans: 全體人員須在週五前更新緊急聯絡資訊。

example: The payroll department processes salaries on the twenty-fifth of every month.
exampleTrans: 薪資部門於每月二十五日處理薪資發放。

example: The warehouse raised hourly wages to attract seasonal workers.
exampleTrans: 倉庫調高時薪以吸引季節性員工。

example: The dealership offers cash incentives to first-time buyers.
exampleTrans: 這家經銷商提供現金優惠給首購族。

example: Free gym membership is one of the most popular perks at our firm.
exampleTrans: 免費健身房會籍是本公司最受歡迎的福利之一。

example: Employees on overseas assignments receive a daily meal allowance.
exampleTrans: 派駐海外的員工可領取每日餐費津貼。

example: Prospective employees can learn about our culture at the job fair.
exampleTrans: 潛在的求職者可在就業博覽會上了解我們的企業文化。

example: Five applicants were shortlisted for the regional manager position.
exampleTrans: 五位應徵者被列入區域經理職位的決選名單。

example: Initial screening of resumes will be completed by the end of the week.
exampleTrans: 履歷的初步篩選將於本週結束前完成。

example: Managers may nominate outstanding staff for the annual excellence award.
exampleTrans: 主管可提名表現優異的員工角逐年度卓越獎。

example: The director designated Ms. Chen to lead the recruitment drive.
exampleTrans: 總監指派陳女士主導這次的招募活動。

example: The retiring CEO will help train her successor during the transition.
exampleTrans: 即將退休的執行長會在交接期間協助培訓繼任者。

example: The new manager continued several policies introduced by his predecessor.
exampleTrans: 新任經理延續了前任推行的幾項政策。

example: The travel package includes a free transfer between the airport and the hotel.
exampleTrans: 此旅遊套裝行程包含機場與飯店之間的免費接送。

example: The company covers relocation expenses for employees transferred overseas.
exampleTrans: 公司為外派海外的員工支付搬遷費用。

example: The workshop takes on two apprentices every spring to learn the trade.
exampleTrans: 這間工坊每年春天收兩名學徒學習這門技藝。

example: Please provide two references from previous employers with your application.
exampleTrans: 請隨申請文件提供兩位前雇主推薦人。

example: She was promoted early because of her exemplary customer service record.
exampleTrans: 她因模範級的客服紀錄而提前升遷。

example: Diligent record keeping helped the assistant pass the audit smoothly.
exampleTrans: 勤勉的紀錄管理讓這位助理順利通過稽核。

example: Order more stationery before the supply cabinet runs empty.
exampleTrans: 請在文具櫃見底前訂購更多文具。

example: The photocopier on the third floor is out of toner again.
exampleTrans: 三樓的影印機又沒碳粉了。

example: Please file all client correspondence in the shared drive.
exampleTrans: 請將所有客戶往來信件歸檔至共用磁碟。

example: A memorandum about the new dress code was circulated this morning.
exampleTrans: 一份關於新服裝規定的備忘錄今早已傳閱。

example: Please expedite the delivery of the sample kits so the client receives them before the trade show.
exampleTrans: 請加速寄送樣品組，讓客戶能在展覽前收到。

example: We will notify you by text message once your package is out for delivery.
exampleTrans: 您的包裹開始配送時，我們會以簡訊通知您。

example: All pricing information shared during the talks must remain strictly confidential.
exampleTrans: 會談期間分享的所有價格資訊都必須嚴格保密。

example: The contract draft is included as an attachment to this email.
exampleTrans: 合約草稿已作為本郵件的附件一併寄出。

example: For technical support, please dial extension 204.
exampleTrans: 如需技術支援，請撥分機 204。

example: A sensor malfunction caused the conveyor belt to stop for nearly an hour.
exampleTrans: 感測器故障導致輸送帶停止運轉將近一小時。

example: Routine maintenance is scheduled every Sunday when the plant is closed.
exampleTrans: 例行維護安排在每週日工廠停工時進行。

example: The company plans to renovate the lobby to impress visiting clients.
exampleTrans: 公司計畫翻修大廳，讓來訪客戶留下好印象。

example: Personal items should be stored inside your own cubicle.
exampleTrans: 個人物品應存放在自己的隔間內。

example: Ergonomic keyboards were provided to reduce wrist strain among staff.
exampleTrans: 公司提供人體工學鍵盤，以減少員工手腕的負擔。

example: The new barcode system will streamline the way we process outgoing shipments.
exampleTrans: 新的條碼系統將簡化我們處理出貨的方式。

example: Prioritize urgent client requests before handling internal paperwork.
exampleTrans: 先處理緊急的客戶需求，再處理內部文書作業。

example: Delegates from twelve countries attended the trade summit in Seoul.
exampleTrans: 來自十二個國家的代表出席了在首爾舉行的貿易高峰會。

example: The temporary staff helped reduce the team's workload during peak season.
exampleTrans: 臨時人員在旺季協助減輕了團隊的工作量。

example: Employees who work overtime must obtain approval in advance.
exampleTrans: 加班的員工必須事先取得核准。

example: Please be punctual, as the factory tour will begin exactly at nine.
exampleTrans: 請務必準時，因為工廠參觀將於九點整開始。

example: Staff may telecommute up to three days per week with manager approval.
exampleTrans: 經主管核准，員工每週最多可遠距上班三天。

example: The assistant ran a quick errand to pick up the printed brochures.
exampleTrans: 助理跑了一趟差事去取印好的手冊。

example: All kitchen appliances in the break room are inspected monthly.
exampleTrans: 茶水間的所有廚房電器每月檢查一次。

example: Remember to replenish the paper trays before the morning rush.
exampleTrans: 記得在早晨尖峰前補充紙匣的紙張。

example: Keep a duplicate of the signed agreement in the office safe.
exampleTrans: 將已簽署協議的副本存放在辦公室保險箱。

example: Archive any project files that have been inactive for over a year.
exampleTrans: 將閒置超過一年的專案檔案歸檔。

example: You can retrieve archived invoices through the document portal.
exampleTrans: 你可以透過文件入口網站檢索已歸檔的發票。

example: The analyst compiled the quarterly figures into a single summary sheet.
exampleTrans: 分析師將各季度數字彙整成一份摘要表。

example: Please revise the manual to reflect the updated safety procedures.
exampleTrans: 請修訂手冊以反映最新的安全程序。

example: Always proofread the newsletter before sending it to subscribers.
exampleTrans: 寄送電子報給訂閱者前務必先校對。

example: The updated holiday schedule was circulated to all departments.
exampleTrans: 更新後的假期時程表已傳閱給所有部門。

example: Only the finance director is authorized to sign contracts above one million dollars.
exampleTrans: 只有財務長獲授權簽署超過一百萬美元的合約。

example: Please endorse the check on the back before depositing it.
exampleTrans: 存入支票前，請先在背面背書。

example: The press room is adjacent to the main hall, just past the registration desk.
exampleTrans: 媒體室緊鄰主會場，就在報到櫃檯後方。

example: Our help center is accessible around the clock through the website.
exampleTrans: 我們的服務中心可透過網站全天候使用。

example: The upgraded suite is spacious enough to host a small client meeting.
exampleTrans: 升等後的套房寬敞到足以舉行小型客戶會議。

example: Please remove the clutter from your desk before the client visit.
exampleTrans: 客戶來訪前，請清除桌上的雜物。

example: The janitor locks the building after the evening shift ends.
exampleTrans: 晚班結束後，工友會將大樓上鎖。

example: The receptionist will issue visitor badges at the front desk.
exampleTrans: 接待員會在前台發放訪客識別證。

example: An announcement over the intercom asked staff to evacuate calmly.
exampleTrans: 內部廣播系統的通知要求員工冷靜疏散。

example: Smoking is prohibited anywhere on the company premises.
exampleTrans: 公司場所內任何地方都禁止吸菸。

example: Fire exits are located at both ends of the main corridor.
exampleTrans: 主走廊兩端都設有逃生出口。

example: Complimentary coffee and snacks are stocked in the office pantry.
exampleTrans: 辦公室茶水間備有免費咖啡與點心。

example: Installation of the new printers is scheduled for Monday morning.
exampleTrans: 新印表機的安裝排定於週一上午進行。

example: The technician walked the caller through steps to troubleshoot the printer.
exampleTrans: 技術人員引導來電者逐步排除印表機的故障。

example: The support team is clearing a backlog of customer inquiries.
exampleTrans: 客服團隊正在消化積壓的顧客詢問。

example: The night shift starts at ten and runs until six the next morning.
exampleTrans: 夜班從十點開始，一直到隔天早上六點。

example: Her meticulous attention to detail prevented a costly billing error.
exampleTrans: 她一絲不苟的細心避免了一次代價高昂的帳務錯誤。

example: The new software automates the tedious task of entering receipts.
exampleTrans: 新軟體將輸入收據這項乏味的工作自動化了。

example: All operators must adhere to the standard procedures posted beside each machine.
exampleTrans: 所有操作員都必須遵守張貼在每台機器旁的標準程序。

example: The firm moved its headquarters from Chicago to Austin last year.
exampleTrans: 該公司去年將總部從芝加哥遷至奧斯汀。

example: Our overseas affiliates handle distribution in their local markets.
exampleTrans: 我們的海外關係企業負責當地市場的經銷。

example: The startup was incorporated in Delaware for tax purposes.
exampleTrans: 這家新創公司基於稅務考量在德拉瓦州註冊成立。

example: The family enterprise has grown into a national retail chain.
exampleTrans: 這家家族企業已成長為全國性的零售連鎖。

example: The media conglomerate owns television stations in twelve countries.
exampleTrans: 這個媒體集團在十二個國家擁有電視台。

example: Senior executives will review the restructuring plan next week.
exampleTrans: 高階主管將於下週審查重組計畫。

example: Shareholders will vote on the proposed acquisition at the annual meeting.
exampleTrans: 股東將在年度大會上就收購提案進行表決。

example: All stakeholders were consulted before the factory relocation was approved.
exampleTrans: 工廠遷移案核准前已徵詢所有利害關係人的意見。

example: The consumer electronics division reported record profits this year.
exampleTrans: 消費電子事業部今年繳出創紀錄的獲利。

example: The company will restructure its sales operations into three regions.
exampleTrans: 公司將把銷售業務重組為三個區域。

example: Rather than downsize, the firm reduced executive bonuses to cut costs.
exampleTrans: 公司沒有縮編，而是削減主管獎金來降低成本。

example: The acquisition of the regional bank expanded the group's customer base.
exampleTrans: 收購該區域銀行擴大了集團的客戶基礎。

example: The young entrepreneur turned a food truck into a franchise business.
exampleTrans: 這位年輕創業家把一台餐車發展成加盟事業。

example: All branding materials must follow the corporate style guide.
exampleTrans: 所有品牌素材都必須遵循公司的風格指南。

example: The startup keeps a flat hierarchy to speed up decision making.
exampleTrans: 這家新創維持扁平的組織層級以加快決策。

example: The two firms launched a joint venture to develop electric vehicles.
exampleTrans: 兩家公司成立合資事業以開發電動車。

example: The startup attracted funding after its app reached a million downloads.
exampleTrans: 這家新創在應用程式下載量破百萬後吸引到資金。

example: The founder still approves every major product decision personally.
exampleTrans: 創辦人至今仍親自核准每項重大產品決策。

example: The chairperson opened the annual general meeting with a brief speech.
exampleTrans: 董事長以簡短致詞為年度股東大會揭開序幕。

example: The marketing director oversees campaigns across all regions.
exampleTrans: 行銷總監統籌所有區域的行銷活動。

example: External accountants will audit our financial records next month.
exampleTrans: 外部會計師下個月將審計我們的財務紀錄。

example: The company announced a higher dividend for shareholders this year.
exampleTrans: 該公司宣布今年將發放較高的股利給股東。

example: The company's fixed assets include two warehouses and a fleet of delivery trucks.
exampleTrans: 公司的固定資產包括兩座倉庫和一批貨運卡車。

example: The contract limits the supplier's liability to the value of the goods delivered.
exampleTrans: 合約將供應商的法律責任限制在所交付貨物的價值範圍內。

example: The overseas branch became profitable within its second year.
exampleTrans: 海外分公司在第二年內就開始獲利。

example: Investors increasingly favor companies with sustainable business practices.
exampleTrans: 投資人越來越青睞具有永續經營做法的公司。

example: Advisors recommend that clients diversify their holdings across several industries.
exampleTrans: 顧問建議客戶將持股分散到多個產業。

example: To save on freight costs, we consolidate small orders into one weekly delivery.
exampleTrans: 為了節省運費，我們將小額訂單整合成每週一次的配送。

example: Rapid expansion into Asia doubled the company's customer base.

example: Ms. Park was appointed to oversee the merger integration process.
exampleTrans: 朴女士獲任命監督合併整合流程。

example: A good leader listens carefully to feedback from subordinates.
exampleTrans: 優秀的領導者會仔細聆聽部屬的回饋。

example: Each party will keep one signed counterpart of the agreement for its records.
exampleTrans: 各方將保留一份已簽署的協議副本以供存查。

example: He serves as the liaison between the design team and the factory.
exampleTrans: 他擔任設計團隊與工廠之間的聯絡窗口。

example: The spokesperson confirmed that the product launch is still on schedule.
exampleTrans: 發言人證實產品上市仍按原定時程進行。

example: A committee was formed to evaluate the environmental impact of the plant.
exampleTrans: 公司成立了一個委員會，評估工廠的環境影響。

example: According to the company bylaws, board elections are held every two years.
exampleTrans: 根據公司章程，董事會選舉每兩年舉行一次。

example: A consortium of five firms won the contract to build the new terminal.
exampleTrans: 由五家公司組成的聯盟贏得了新航廈的興建合約。

example: She invested her savings in a coffee shop franchise.
exampleTrans: 她把積蓄投資在一家咖啡店的加盟事業上。

example: The company filed a patent for its new battery technology last spring.
exampleTrans: 該公司去年春天為其新電池技術申請了專利。

example: The logo cannot be used in advertising until the trademark is registered.
exampleTrans: 在商標註冊完成前，該標誌不得用於廣告。

example: The proprietor of the bookstore plans to add a small cafe.
exampleTrans: 書店業主計畫增設一間小咖啡館。

example: The founders retained a majority equity stake after the funding round.
exampleTrans: 創辦人在募資後仍保有多數股權。

example: Our fiscal year begins in April rather than January.
exampleTrans: 我們的會計年度從四月開始，而不是一月。

example: Moving to a smaller office helped the firm cut its overhead considerably.
exampleTrans: 搬到較小的辦公室幫助公司大幅削減了經常性開支。

example: Rising material costs have narrowed our profit margin this year.
exampleTrans: 原物料成本上漲使我們今年的利潤率縮小了。

example: The firm decided to outsource payroll processing to a specialist provider.
exampleTrans: 公司決定將薪資作業外包給專業服務商。

example: The government plans to privatize the national railway operator.
exampleTrans: 政府計畫將國營鐵路公司民營化。

example: The incumbent president of the association is seeking a second term.
exampleTrans: 協會現任會長正在尋求連任。

example: The brand opened its flagship store on the city's busiest shopping street.
exampleTrans: 該品牌在市內最繁忙的購物街開設了旗艦店。

example: Every transaction must be recorded in the general ledger by the end of the day.
exampleTrans: 每筆交易都必須在當天結束前登錄到總帳中。

example: The depreciation of office equipment is calculated over a five-year period.
exampleTrans: 辦公設備的折舊是以五年期間計算的。

example: The finance team proposed several measures to reduce the budget deficit.
exampleTrans: 財務團隊提出了幾項措施來縮減預算赤字。

example: The surplus of unsold units led management to pause production for a week.
exampleTrans: 未售出產品過剩，使管理層決定暫停生產一週。

example: The board decided to allocate additional funds to the research division.
exampleTrans: 董事會決定撥出額外資金給研發部門。

example: The accounting office will disburse travel allowances on the first business day of each month.
exampleTrans: 會計室將於每月第一個工作日發放差旅津貼。

example: Please enclose your remittance with the completed order form.
exampleTrans: 請將匯款連同填妥的訂購單一併附上。

example: Our accounts receivable have grown because several clients delayed their payments.
exampleTrans: 由於幾家客戶延遲付款，我們的應收帳款增加了。

example: The balance is payable within thirty days of receiving the statement.
exampleTrans: 餘額應於收到帳單後三十天內支付。

example: The software license fee will be amortized over three years.
exampleTrans: 軟體授權費將分三年攤銷。

example: The clerk reconciles the bank statement with the cash records every Friday.
exampleTrans: 職員每週五將銀行對帳單與現金紀錄核對。

example: An internal review uncovered a discrepancy between the two expense reports.
exampleTrans: 內部審查發現兩份費用報告之間有出入。

example: Employees must itemize all business expenses when submitting a claim.
exampleTrans: 員工申請費用核銷時必須逐項列出所有業務支出。

example: Each delegate received a meal voucher valid at any restaurant in the convention center.
exampleTrans: 每位代表都收到一張可在會議中心任何餐廳使用的餐券。

example: Interest will accrue daily on any unpaid balance.
exampleTrans: 任何未付餘額都將按日累計利息。

example: The payroll system automatically deducts insurance premiums from each paycheck.
exampleTrans: 薪資系統會自動從每筆薪資中扣除保險費。

meaning: 未支付的、未解決的；傑出的
example: Please settle all outstanding balances before the account is closed.
exampleTrans: 請在帳戶關閉前結清所有未付餘額。

example: The auditors examined the firm's solvency before approving the annual report.
exampleTrans: 審計人員在核准年度報告前檢視了公司的償債能力。

example: Keeping a cash reserve improves the company's liquidity during slow seasons.
exampleTrans: 保留現金儲備可以在淡季提升公司的流動性。

example: The consultant suggested ways to improve the profitability of each branch.
exampleTrans: 顧問提出了提升各分店獲利能力的方法。

example: The new plant is expected to reach its breakeven point within two years.
exampleTrans: 新廠預計在兩年內達到損益兩平點。

example: The finance director approved a write-off of the uncollectible debt.
exampleTrans: 財務總監批准沖銷該筆無法收回的債務。

example: Accurate bookkeeping makes the year-end closing process much smoother.
exampleTrans: 精確的記帳讓年終結算流程順暢許多。

example: All travel expenses must be approved by a manager in advance.
exampleTrans: 所有差旅費用都必須事先經主管核准。

example: The project incurred unexpected costs when the supplier raised its prices.
exampleTrans: 供應商漲價時，該專案產生了意料之外的成本。

example: Strong overseas sales helped offset the decline in the domestic market.
exampleTrans: 強勁的海外銷售有助於抵銷國內市場的下滑。

example: The sales projections for next year will be presented at the board meeting.
exampleTrans: 明年的銷售預估將在董事會會議上報告。

example: The report explains the variance between budgeted and actual spending.
exampleTrans: 這份報告說明了預算支出與實際支出之間的差異。

example: The seminar covers recent changes in corporate taxation.
exampleTrans: 這場研討會涵蓋近期企業稅制的變動。

example: Employers are required to withhold income tax from employees' wages.
exampleTrans: 雇主必須從員工薪資中預扣所得稅。

example: The equipment can be paid for in twelve monthly installments.
exampleTrans: 這批設備可以分十二個月分期付款。

example: The tenant fell into arrears after missing two rent payments.
exampleTrans: 這名房客在漏繳兩期租金後開始拖欠款項。

example: The firm plans to capitalize on the tax incentives offered to green manufacturers.
exampleTrans: 該公司計劃善用提供給綠色製造商的稅務優惠。

example: It would be prudent to set aside funds for unexpected repairs.
exampleTrans: 預留資金以應付突發維修費用會是審慎的做法。

example: The company enforces stringent controls on petty cash spending.
exampleTrans: 公司對零用金支出實施嚴格的管控。

example: Management decided to curtail discretionary spending until sales recover.
exampleTrans: 管理層決定在銷售回穩前縮減非必要支出。

example: The remuneration package includes a base salary and performance bonuses.
exampleTrans: 薪酬方案包含底薪與績效獎金。

example: The committee approved an appropriation for upgrading the factory's machinery.
exampleTrans: 委員會批准了一筆用於升級工廠機械的撥款。

example: The auditor found that maintenance costs had been understated in the report.
exampleTrans: 審計員發現報告中的維護成本被低報了。

example: Operators must verify the machine settings before starting a new production run.
exampleTrans: 操作員在開始新一輪生產前必須核實機器設定。

example: A well-balanced portfolio can protect investors from sudden market swings.
exampleTrans: 均衡的投資組合能保護投資人免受市場劇烈波動的影響。

example: The bank accepted the warehouse as collateral for the business loan.
exampleTrans: 銀行接受該倉庫作為企業貸款的擔保品。

example: They applied for a twenty-year mortgage to purchase the office building.
exampleTrans: 他們申請了二十年期的抵押貸款來購買這棟辦公大樓。

example: Improving the yield of the chip production process is our top priority this quarter.
exampleTrans: 提升晶片製程的良率是我們本季的首要任務。

example: The certificate of deposit reaches maturity in eighteen months.
exampleTrans: 這張定期存單將於十八個月後到期。

example: Each monthly payment covers both the principal and the interest.
exampleTrans: 每月還款同時涵蓋本金與利息。

example: She opened an account with an online brokerage to trade stocks.
exampleTrans: 她在一家網路券商開戶以進行股票交易。

example: Analysts advised caution because the currency market remains volatile.
exampleTrans: 由於外匯市場仍不穩定，分析師建議謹慎行事。

example: Exchange rates fluctuate daily, affecting the cost of imported goods.
exampleTrans: 匯率每天波動，影響進口商品的成本。

example: Property values in the district have appreciated steadily over the past decade.
exampleTrans: 該區的房地產價值在過去十年間穩定增值。

example: The importer bought futures contracts to hedge against rising fuel prices.
exampleTrans: 該進口商購買期貨合約以規避燃料價格上漲的風險。

example: The investor liquidated part of her holdings to free up cash.
exampleTrans: 這位投資人將部分持股變現以取得現金。

example: Two investment banks agreed to underwrite the company's public offering.
exampleTrans: 兩家投資銀行同意承銷該公司的公開發行。

example: Some traders speculate on short-term price movements rather than investing long term.
exampleTrans: 有些交易員投機於短期價格波動，而非長期投資。

example: The fund manager identified a lucrative opportunity in renewable energy stocks.
exampleTrans: 基金經理人在再生能源股中發現了一個有利可圖的機會。

example: The conglomerate acquired a thirty percent stake in the logistics startup.
exampleTrans: 該集團收購了這家物流新創公司百分之三十的股份。

example: The trustee manages the pension fund on behalf of the employees.
exampleTrans: 受託人代表員工管理退休基金。

example: The bank acts as custodian for the fund's securities and cash.
exampleTrans: 該銀行擔任基金證券與現金的保管機構。

example: He purchased an annuity to guarantee a steady income after retirement.
exampleTrans: 他購買了年金，以確保退休後有穩定收入。

example: Your insurance premium may increase if you file multiple claims.
exampleTrans: 如果你多次申請理賠，保費可能會調漲。

example: The fund allows redemption of shares on any business day.
exampleTrans: 該基金允許在任何營業日贖回持份。

example: The bank charges a fee for withdrawals made at overseas ATMs.
exampleTrans: 在海外自動櫃員機提款，銀行會收取手續費。

example: The business arranged an overdraft facility to cover short-term cash gaps.
exampleTrans: 該企業安排了透支額度以填補短期資金缺口。

example: The company negotiated new repayment terms with its creditors.
exampleTrans: 該公司與債權人協商了新的還款條件。

example: The collection agency contacted the debtor about the overdue loan.
exampleTrans: 催收機構就逾期貸款聯繫了債務人。

example: The retailer was declared insolvent after failing to pay its suppliers.
exampleTrans: 這家零售商因無法支付供應商貨款而被宣告破產。

example: Borrowers who default on their loans may lose their collateral.
exampleTrans: 貸款違約的借款人可能會失去擔保品。

example: Rumors of a takeover pushed the company's share price sharply higher.
exampleTrans: 併購傳聞使該公司股價大幅上揚。

example: You can review all recent transactions through the mobile banking app.
exampleTrans: 你可以透過行動銀行應用程式查看所有近期交易。

example: The teller helped the customer set up a new savings account.
exampleTrans: 櫃員協助這位顧客開立新的儲蓄帳戶。

example: We will wire the payment to your overseas account within two business days.
exampleTrans: 我們將在兩個工作日內把款項電匯到您的海外帳戶。

example: The fund's performance is measured against a market benchmark.
exampleTrans: 該基金的績效是以市場基準來衡量的。

example: Investors remain bullish about the technology sector's prospects.
exampleTrans: 投資人對科技產業的前景仍持樂觀看漲態度。

example: The strategist turned bearish after the disappointing employment data.
exampleTrans: 在令人失望的就業數據公布後，該策略師轉為看跌。

example: The central bank raised interest rates to keep inflation under control.
exampleTrans: 央行升息以控制通貨膨脹。

example: Many firms froze hiring during the recession to preserve cash.
exampleTrans: 許多公司在經濟衰退期間凍結招募以保留現金。

example: Trading volume surged after the earnings announcement.
exampleTrans: 財報公布後，交易量激增。

example: The stock plummeted when the company withdrew its profit guidance.

example: Institutional investors subscribed to most of the newly issued shares.
exampleTrans: 機構投資人認購了大部分新發行的股票。

example: Read the prospectus carefully before investing in the fund.
exampleTrans: 投資該基金前，請仔細閱讀公開說明書。

example: The startup is soliciting funds from private investors to expand overseas.
exampleTrans: 這家新創公司正向私人投資者募集資金以拓展海外市場。

example: The government plans to levy a new tax on financial transactions.

example: The deposit will be held in escrow until the property transfer is complete.
exampleTrans: 訂金將由第三方託管，直到產權移轉完成為止。

example: The advertising campaign will run across social media and television.
exampleTrans: 這波廣告活動將在社群媒體與電視上同步進行。

example: Customer testimonials on the website helped boost online sales.
exampleTrans: 網站上的顧客見證有助於提升線上銷售。

example: The new beverage is aimed at a younger demographic.
exampleTrans: 這款新飲品鎖定較年輕的客群。

example: The luxury segment of the market grew faster than expected.
exampleTrans: 市場中的高端區隔成長速度超乎預期。

example: The travel agency mailed brochures describing its summer packages.
exampleTrans: 旅行社寄出了介紹夏季套裝行程的手冊。

example: Staff handed out flyers announcing the store's grand opening.

example: The charity event generated a great deal of positive publicity for the brand.

example: The marketing team expanded its outreach to small business owners.
exampleTrans: 行銷團隊擴大了對小型企業主的推廣活動。

example: The company will launch its new smartphone at a press event in Tokyo.
exampleTrans: 該公司將在東京的記者會上發表新款智慧型手機。

example: The automaker unveiled its concept car at the international trade fair.
exampleTrans: 這家汽車製造商在國際商展上首度公開其概念車。

example: A giant billboard near the highway advertises the new shopping mall.
exampleTrans: 高速公路旁的大型看板正在宣傳新開幕的購物中心。

example: The thirty-second commercial will air during the evening news.
exampleTrans: 這支三十秒的廣告將在晚間新聞時段播出。

example: Several local companies agreed to sponsor the city marathon.
exampleTrans: 幾家本地公司同意贊助這場城市馬拉松。

example: Seasonal markdowns attracted large crowds to the department store.
exampleTrans: 換季降價吸引大批人潮湧入百貨公司。

example: The retailer applies a forty percent markup on imported goods.
exampleTrans: 這家零售商對進口商品加價四成。

example: Wholesale customers must place a minimum order of one hundred units per item.
exampleTrans: 批發客戶每項商品的最低訂購量為一百件。

example: The brand plans to open ten new retail locations across the region.
exampleTrans: 該品牌計劃在整個地區開設十家新的零售據點。

example: We are seeking a regional distributor to handle sales across Southeast Asia.
exampleTrans: 我們正在尋找一家區域經銷商來負責東南亞的銷售。

example: All merchandise on the clearance rack is discounted by half.

example: The sales team follows up with every prospect within two days of first contact.

example: The renovated restaurant now attracts a more upscale clientele.

example: The loyalty program rewards frequent shoppers with exclusive discounts.

example: The brand repositioned itself to compete in the upscale fashion market.

meaning: 價格實惠的、負擔得起的
example: The airline introduced affordable fares to attract budget travelers.
exampleTrans: 這家航空公司推出實惠票價以吸引精打細算的旅客。

meaning: 有競爭力的；競爭激烈的
example: We offer competitive pricing without compromising on quality.
exampleTrans: 我們提供具競爭力的價格，同時不犧牲品質。

example: The smartphone market has become saturated, so growth is slowing.
exampleTrans: 智慧型手機市場已趨飽和，因此成長正在放緩。

example: The company partnered with a local firm to penetrate the European market.
exampleTrans: 該公司與當地企業合作以打入歐洲市場。

example: Superior after-sales service differentiates our brand from competitors.
exampleTrans: 優異的售後服務使我們的品牌有別於競爭對手。

example: The startup found a profitable niche in eco-friendly packaging.
exampleTrans: 這家新創公司在環保包裝領域找到了有利可圖的利基市場。

example: The campaign highlights the cutting-edge features of the new laptop.
exampleTrans: 這波宣傳活動強調新款筆電的尖端功能。

example: The plant adopted an innovative cooling method that cuts water use in half.
exampleTrans: 工廠採用了一種創新的冷卻方法，使用水量減半。

example: The brand operates more than fifty outlets nationwide.
exampleTrans: 該品牌在全國經營超過五十個銷售據點。

example: Customers can test the furniture at our downtown showroom.
exampleTrans: 顧客可以在我們市中心的展示間試用家具。

example: Over two hundred vendors will exhibit their products at the expo.
exampleTrans: 超過兩百家廠商將在博覽會上展出他們的產品。

example: The annual trade exposition draws buyers from around the world.
exampleTrans: 這場年度商業博覽會吸引了來自世界各地的買家。

example: Visitors who complete the survey will receive a free giveaway at the booth.
exampleTrans: 完成問卷的參觀者可在攤位領取免費贈品。

example: Present this coupon at checkout to receive twenty percent off.
exampleTrans: 結帳時出示此折價券即可享八折優惠。

example: The magazine offers a discounted annual subscription for students.
exampleTrans: 這本雜誌為學生提供折扣年費訂閱方案。

example: The provider bundles internet, phone, and streaming services at a reduced rate.
exampleTrans: 這家業者以優惠價格綑綁銷售網路、電話與串流服務。

example: Online orders surpassed in-store sales for the first time last quarter.
exampleTrans: 上一季線上訂單首次超越實體店銷售。

example: The holiday promotion boosted foot traffic in all our stores.
exampleTrans: 節慶促銷提升了我們所有門市的來客數。

meaning: 引人注目的、令人信服的
example: A compelling slogan can make a brand memorable to consumers.
exampleTrans: 引人注目的標語能讓品牌深植消費者心中。

example: The support center receives hundreds of inquiries about billing each week.
exampleTrans: 客服中心每週收到數百件有關帳單的詢問。

example: All complaints are logged and reviewed by the quality assurance team.
exampleTrans: 所有投訴都會被記錄並由品保團隊審查。

example: Our goal is to resolve every service issue within twenty-four hours.
exampleTrans: 我們的目標是在二十四小時內解決每個服務問題。

example: If the agent cannot fix the problem, the case is escalated to a specialist.
exampleTrans: 如果客服人員無法解決問題，案件會上報給專員處理。

example: The hotel staff were courteous and helped us rearrange our meeting room at short notice.
exampleTrans: 飯店員工非常有禮，並在臨時通知下協助我們重新安排會議室。

example: Thank you for your prompt reply to our request.
exampleTrans: 感謝您對我們的請求迅速回覆。

example: The attentive waiter refilled our glasses without being asked.
exampleTrans: 這位細心的服務生不必我們開口就替我們續杯。

example: We sincerely apologize for the delay in processing your order.
exampleTrans: 我們誠摯地為延遲處理您的訂單致歉。

example: The airline compensated passengers for the canceled flight with travel credits.
exampleTrans: 航空公司以旅遊點數補償航班取消的乘客。

example: As a gesture of goodwill, the store offered the customer a gift card.
exampleTrans: 作為善意的表示，店家送給這位顧客一張禮物卡。

example: We thanked our hosts for their warm hospitality during the week-long visit.
exampleTrans: 我們感謝主辦方在為期一週的參訪中給予的熱情款待。

example: The hotel's amenities include a fitness center, a pool, and a business lounge.
exampleTrans: 飯店的便利設施包括健身中心、游泳池和商務貴賓室。

example: The concierge arranged a taxi to take us to the convention center.
exampleTrans: 禮賓人員為我們安排了前往會議中心的計程車。

example: A customer service representative will contact you within one business day.
exampleTrans: 客服代表將在一個工作日內與您聯繫。

example: Call our toll-free hotline if you need help setting up the device.
exampleTrans: 若您在安裝裝置時需要協助，請撥打我們的免付費熱線。

example: A software glitch caused some orders to display the wrong shipping date.
exampleTrans: 軟體的小故障導致部分訂單顯示錯誤的出貨日期。

example: We will send a replacement free of charge if the item arrives damaged.
exampleTrans: 如果商品送達時已損壞，我們將免費寄送替換品。

example: The manager assured the customer that the issue would not happen again.
exampleTrans: 經理向顧客保證這個問題不會再發生。

example: We guarantee delivery within three business days or your shipping is free.
exampleTrans: 我們保證三個工作日內送達，否則運費全免。

example: Handling complaints with empathy often turns unhappy customers into loyal ones.
exampleTrans: 以同理心處理投訴，常能把不滿的顧客變成忠實顧客。

example: Customer satisfaction scores improved after we shortened the waiting time.
exampleTrans: 縮短等候時間後，顧客滿意度分數提升了。

example: The hotline gives customers a direct channel to voice their grievances.
exampleTrans: 這條熱線讓顧客有直接表達不滿的管道。

example: We use customer feedback to improve our products and services.
exampleTrans: 我們利用顧客回饋來改善產品與服務。

example: Please take a moment to complete our brief satisfaction survey.
exampleTrans: 請花一點時間填寫我們簡短的滿意度調查。

example: Guests are asked to fill out a questionnaire about their stay at checkout.
exampleTrans: 房客在退房時會被邀請填寫一份住宿體驗問卷。

example: Most respondents rated the delivery service as excellent.
exampleTrans: 大多數受訪者將配送服務評為優異。

example: The app asks users to leave a rating after each customer service chat.
exampleTrans: 這款應用程式會在每次客服對話後請使用者留下評分。

example: Several customers wrote in to commend the technician for his patience.
exampleTrans: 好幾位顧客來信表揚這位技師的耐心。

example: The company offered a full credit as a remedy for the billing error.
exampleTrans: 公司提供全額折抵作為帳單錯誤的補救措施。

example: We are working to rectify the error in your account statement.
exampleTrans: 我們正在設法改正您帳戶明細中的錯誤。

example: Despite a minor mishap with the luggage, the trip went smoothly.
exampleTrans: 儘管行李出了點小狀況，這趟旅程仍相當順利。

example: Due to an oversight, your discount was not applied to the invoice.
exampleTrans: 由於一時疏忽，您的折扣未套用到帳單上。

example: We apologize for any inconvenience caused by the system maintenance.
exampleTrans: 系統維護造成任何不便，我們深感抱歉。

example: Customers were warned of a brief disruption to online services this weekend.
exampleTrans: 顧客已被告知本週末線上服務將短暫中斷。

example: Predictive maintenance software helped reduce unplanned downtime by thirty percent.
exampleTrans: 預測性維護軟體協助將非計畫性停機時間減少三成。

example: The service plan includes coverage for accidental damage.
exampleTrans: 這項服務方案的保障範圍包含意外損壞。

example: This clause entitles the buyer to cancel the order if delivery is delayed by a month.
exampleTrans: 此條款使買方在交貨延遲一個月時有權取消訂單。

example: The landlord agreed to waive the penalty fee for the first late payment.
exampleTrans: 房東同意免除第一次遲繳的違約金。

example: A courtesy shuttle runs between the hotel and the airport every hour.
exampleTrans: 飯店與機場之間每小時都有免費接駁車往返。

example: You will receive a follow-up call to confirm that the repair was successful.
exampleTrans: 您將接到後續追蹤電話，以確認維修是否成功。

example: Clients value a responsive support team that answers within minutes.
exampleTrans: 客戶重視能在幾分鐘內回覆的迅速客服團隊。

example: The receptionist greeted every visitor in a cordial manner.
exampleTrans: 接待員以親切的態度迎接每一位訪客。

example: The warehouse team will dispatch your order within 24 hours of payment confirmation.
exampleTrans: 倉庫團隊會在付款確認後 24 小時內派送您的訂單。

example: Air freight is faster than sea freight but costs nearly three times as much.
exampleTrans: 空運比海運快，但費用幾乎是三倍。

example: Our logistics department coordinates deliveries to more than forty retail locations.
exampleTrans: 我們的物流部門負責協調四十多個零售據點的配送。

example: The new warehouse near the port can store twice as many pallets as the old one.
exampleTrans: 港口附近的新倉庫能存放的棧板數量是舊倉庫的兩倍。

example: The carrier notified us that severe weather would delay all outbound trucks.
exampleTrans: 運輸業者通知我們，惡劣天氣將使所有出貨卡車延誤。

example: The package was held at customs for three days because the paperwork was incomplete.
exampleTrans: 由於文件不齊全，包裹在海關被扣留了三天。

example: The new tariff on imported steel will raise our production costs by eight percent.
exampleTrans: 進口鋼材的新關稅將使我們的生產成本上升百分之八。

example: Customs clearance usually takes two business days for standard shipments.
exampleTrans: 一般貨件的清關通常需要兩個工作天。

example: All fragile items must be wrapped in bubble wrap before they are boxed.
exampleTrans: 所有易碎物品裝箱前都必須用氣泡紙包好。

example: Perishable goods are transported in refrigerated containers to keep them fresh.
exampleTrans: 易腐壞的商品以冷藏貨櫃運送以保持新鮮。

example: The printer model you requested is on backorder and will ship in two weeks.
exampleTrans: 您訂購的印表機型號目前缺貨待補，將於兩週後出貨。

example: Customers who order in bulk receive a fifteen percent discount on shipping.
exampleTrans: 大量訂購的客戶可享運費八五折優惠。

example: Each container holds roughly two thousand boxes of finished products.
exampleTrans: 每個貨櫃大約可裝兩千箱成品。

example: Stack the cartons on the pallet evenly so the load does not tip during transport.
exampleTrans: 請將紙箱平均堆放在棧板上，以免運送途中傾倒。

example: The machinery parts were packed in wooden crates for the overseas journey.
exampleTrans: 機械零件被裝入木製板條箱以便海外運送。

example: The company hired extra trucks to haul the seasonal merchandise to regional stores.
exampleTrans: 公司加派卡車將季節性商品運送到各地區門市。

example: Two of the monitors were damaged in transit and must be replaced.
exampleTrans: 有兩台螢幕在運送途中受損，必須更換。

example: Please double-check the destination address before printing the shipping label.
exampleTrans: 列印出貨標籤前，請再次確認目的地地址。

example: The recipient must sign for the package upon delivery.
exampleTrans: 包裹送達時，收件人必須簽收。

example: We have enclosed a packing slip listing all the items in this box.
exampleTrans: 我們已在箱內附上一張列出所有品項的裝箱單。

example: Any parcel weighing over twenty kilograms requires an additional handling fee.
exampleTrans: 任何超過二十公斤的包裹都需要額外的處理費。

example: Postage for international orders is calculated at checkout based on weight.
exampleTrans: 國際訂單的郵資會在結帳時依重量計算。

example: A small handling charge applies to all orders shipped in special packaging.
exampleTrans: 所有使用特殊包裝出貨的訂單都會收取少許處理費。

example: You can track your order online using the reference number in the confirmation email.
exampleTrans: 您可以使用確認信中的編號在線上追蹤訂單。

example: Orders received before noon are promptly processed on the same day.
exampleTrans: 中午前收到的訂單會在當天迅速處理。

example: Despite the rough journey, all the glassware arrived intact.
exampleTrans: 儘管運送過程顛簸，所有玻璃器皿都完好無損地送達。

example: Do not stack more than five boxes on top of each other in the storage area.
exampleTrans: 在儲存區內，箱子堆疊不得超過五層。

example: Only certified operators are allowed to drive the forklift in the warehouse.
exampleTrans: 只有持證照的操作員才能在倉庫內駕駛堆高機。

example: Undelivered packages are returned to the central depot at the end of each day.
exampleTrans: 每天結束時，未送達的包裹會被送回中央集散站。

example: Products shipped overseas must include a detailed customs declaration form.
exampleTrans: 運往海外的產品必須附上詳細的報關單。

example: The import duty on electronics varies depending on the country of origin.
exampleTrans: 電子產品的進口關稅依原產國而有所不同。

example: An inaccurate customs declaration can result in fines and shipping delays.
exampleTrans: 不正確的海關申報可能導致罰款和出貨延誤。

example: We recommend that you insure any package valued at more than five hundred dollars.
exampleTrans: 我們建議您為價值超過五百美元的包裹投保。

example: The freight company sent us an estimate for transporting the exhibition booths.
exampleTrans: 貨運公司寄給我們運送展覽攤位的估價單。

example: A fuel surcharge will be added to all deliveries scheduled during peak season.
exampleTrans: 旺季期間安排的所有配送都將加收燃油附加費。

example: The retailer complained that last month's delivery arrived two weeks late.
exampleTrans: 零售商抱怨上個月的貨延遲了兩週才送達。

example: Our distribution center can fulfill up to ten thousand orders per day.
exampleTrans: 我們的配送中心每天最多可完成一萬筆訂單。

example: The company switched to recyclable packaging to reduce its environmental impact.
exampleTrans: 該公司改用可回收包裝以減少對環境的影響。

example: The cargo vessel is scheduled to depart from the harbor on Friday evening.
exampleTrans: 貨船預定於週五晚間從港口啟航。

example: The driver took an alternate route to avoid the highway construction.
exampleTrans: 司機改走替代路線以避開高速公路施工路段。

example: Please acknowledge receipt of the goods by signing and returning the attached form.
exampleTrans: 請簽署並回傳附件表格，以確認收到貨物。

example: The plane's cargo included medical supplies bound for the new clinic.
exampleTrans: 這架飛機的貨物包括運往新診所的醫療用品。

example: All incoming goods must be unloaded at the designated receiving area.
exampleTrans: 所有進貨都必須在指定的收貨區卸貨。

example: The assembly line was upgraded to handle the new smartphone model.
exampleTrans: 組裝線經過升級，以生產新款智慧型手機。

example: The workshop can fabricate custom metal parts within five business days.
exampleTrans: 該工廠能在五個工作天內製造客製化金屬零件。

example: The company opened a second manufacturing facility to meet growing demand.
exampleTrans: 公司開設了第二座製造工廠以因應日益成長的需求。

example: Heavy machinery must be shut down completely before any repairs are made.
exampleTrans: 進行任何維修前，重型機械必須完全關機。

example: A shortage of electronic components forced the plant to reduce output last month.
exampleTrans: 電子零件短缺迫使工廠上個月減少產量。

example: The testing apparatus measures the strength of each welded joint.
exampleTrans: 這台測試儀器可測量每個焊接點的強度。

example: The factory plans to automate its packing process by the end of the year.
exampleTrans: 工廠計劃在年底前將包裝流程自動化。

example: Technicians calibrate the measuring instruments at the start of every shift.
exampleTrans: 技術人員在每個班次開始時校準測量儀器。

example: Quality control staff inspect every tenth unit that comes off the line.
exampleTrans: 品管人員會檢驗生產線上每十件產品中的一件。

example: The parts were rejected because they did not meet the client's specifications.
exampleTrans: 這些零件因不符合客戶規格而遭退回。

example: Engineers presented a working prototype of the foldable keyboard at the meeting.
exampleTrans: 工程師在會議上展示了可摺疊鍵盤的可運作原型。

example: The new casing is made of a durable alloy that resists scratches and dents.
exampleTrans: 新外殼採用耐刮耐撞的耐用合金製成。

example: Monthly output rose by twelve percent after the second production line opened.
exampleTrans: 第二條生產線啟用後，月產量成長了百分之十二。

example: The plant is currently operating at ninety percent of its full capacity.
exampleTrans: 該工廠目前以滿載產能的九成運轉。

example: The engineering team will overhaul the aging press machines during the holiday shutdown.
exampleTrans: 工程團隊將在假期停工期間徹底檢修老舊的沖壓機。

example: These lenses are ground with such precision that errors are measured in microns.
exampleTrans: 這些鏡片研磨得極為精密，誤差以微米計算。

example: Inspectors found a tiny flaw in the coating and sent the batch back for rework.
exampleTrans: 檢驗員在塗層上發現微小瑕疵，將整批退回重工。

example: Rising prices for raw materials have squeezed the factory's profit margins.
exampleTrans: 原物料價格上漲壓縮了工廠的利潤空間。

example: We audited our main supplier to confirm that its factory meets safety standards.
exampleTrans: 我們稽核了主要供應商，以確認其工廠符合安全標準。

example: The automobile plant employs over three thousand workers across two shifts.
exampleTrans: 這座汽車工廠分兩班制僱用了超過三千名員工。

example: New protocols were introduced to safeguard workers operating the cutting machines.
exampleTrans: 工廠導入新規範以保護操作切割機的工人。

example: Hazardous chemicals must be stored in clearly labeled, locked cabinets.
exampleTrans: 危險化學品必須存放在標示清楚且上鎖的櫃子裡。

example: Everyone entering the production floor must wear protective goggles and gloves.
exampleTrans: 進入生產區的每個人都必須配戴防護眼鏡和手套。

example: The company decided to standardize its testing methods across all three factories.
exampleTrans: 公司決定將三座工廠的測試方法全部標準化。

example: Engineers used simulation software to optimize the layout of the workshop.
exampleTrans: 工程師使用模擬軟體來最佳化車間的配置。

example: Replacing the old motors improved the plant's energy efficiency significantly.
exampleTrans: 更換老舊馬達大幅提升了工廠的能源效率。

example: Productivity rose sharply once workers received training on the new equipment.
exampleTrans: 員工接受新設備訓練後，生產力大幅提升。

example: The automated sorting system doubled the daily throughput of the packing station.
exampleTrans: 自動分揀系統使包裝站的每日處理量翻倍。

example: Each batch of tablets is tested for purity before it leaves the laboratory.
exampleTrans: 每一批藥錠在離開實驗室前都要檢測純度。

example: A labor shortage during the holidays slowed the final packaging stage.
exampleTrans: 假期期間的人力短缺拖慢了最後的包裝階段。

example: Contractors will install the new ventilation system over the weekend.
exampleTrans: 承包商將在週末安裝新的通風系統。

example: Workers had to dismantle the old assembly line to make room for the robots.
exampleTrans: 工人必須拆除舊組裝線，為機器人騰出空間。

example: Remember to lubricate the moving parts of the press every five hundred hours.
exampleTrans: 記得每五百小時為沖壓機的活動零件上潤滑油。

example: Rubber seals deteriorate quickly when they are exposed to extreme heat.
exampleTrans: 橡膠密封圈暴露在高溫下會迅速劣化。

example: Management approved a budget to upgrade the factory's control software.
exampleTrans: 管理層核准了升級工廠控制軟體的預算。

example: Every helmet undergoes rigorous impact testing before it is approved for sale.
exampleTrans: 每頂安全帽在核准販售前都要經過嚴格的撞擊測試。

example: An independent agency will certify that the facility meets international quality standards.
exampleTrans: 獨立機構將認證該廠房符合國際品質標準。

example: Discard any parts that fail the pressure test and record the batch number.
exampleTrans: 凡未通過壓力測試的零件一律丟棄，並記錄批號。

example: The factory utilizes recycled aluminum in more than half of its products.
exampleTrans: 該工廠有超過一半的產品利用回收鋁材製造。

example: The confidentiality clause remains in effect for two years after the contract ends.
exampleTrans: 保密條款在合約結束後兩年內仍然有效。

example: Under the new provision, either party may request a review of the pricing terms annually.
exampleTrans: 根據新條文，任一方每年皆可要求重新審視價格條件。

example: The agreement stipulates that payment must be made within thirty days of delivery.
exampleTrans: 協議明文規定必須在交貨後三十天內付款。

example: Once both parties sign, the memorandum becomes a legally binding document.
exampleTrans: 雙方簽署後，該備忘錄即成為具法律約束力的文件。

example: Failure to deliver the goods on time constitutes a breach of contract.
exampleTrans: 未能準時交貨即構成違約。

example: Either party may terminate the agreement with ninety days' written notice.
exampleTrans: 任一方均可提前九十天以書面通知終止本協議。

example: The vendor offered a discount if we renew the service contract for another year.
exampleTrans: 若我們再續約一年服務合約，供應商將提供折扣。

example: Any alteration made without written approval renders the contract void.
exampleTrans: 未經書面核准所做的任何修改都會使合約無效。

example: The court has the authority to enforce the terms of the settlement.
exampleTrans: 法院有權執行和解協議的條款。

example: The contractor agreed to indemnify the client against any losses caused by faulty work.
exampleTrans: 承包商同意就施工瑕疵造成的任何損失賠償客戶。

example: Both companies agreed to settle the disagreement through arbitration rather than in court.
exampleTrans: 兩家公司同意透過仲裁而非法院訴訟來解決分歧。

example: Prolonged litigation over the patent drained both firms' legal budgets.
exampleTrans: 曠日費時的專利訴訟耗盡了兩家公司的法務預算。

example: The plaintiff claims that the manufacturer ignored repeated safety warnings.
exampleTrans: 原告主張製造商忽視了多次的安全警告。

example: The defendant denied all allegations of copying the software design.
exampleTrans: 被告否認所有抄襲軟體設計的指控。

example: Our attorney reviewed the licensing agreement before we signed it.
exampleTrans: 我們的律師在簽署前審閱了授權協議。

example: The board sought outside counsel before responding to the lawsuit.
exampleTrans: 董事會在回應訴訟前先徵詢了外部法律顧問。

example: The agreement prohibits the disclosure of trade secrets to third parties.
exampleTrans: 協議禁止向第三方揭露商業機密。

example: Employees may not copy proprietary software onto personal devices.
exampleTrans: 員工不得將專有軟體複製到個人裝置上。

example: The publisher holds the copyright to all training materials produced in-house.
exampleTrans: 出版商擁有所有內部製作教材的著作權。

example: The court ruled that the rival's design did not infringe on our patent.
exampleTrans: 法院裁定競爭對手的設計並未侵害我們的專利。

example: The supplier has an obligation to replace any goods that fail inspection.
exampleTrans: 供應商有義務更換任何未通過檢驗的貨品。

example: The parties hereby agree to the terms set forth in this document.
exampleTrans: 雙方特此同意本文件所載之條款。

example: The contract runs for one year and renews automatically each year thereafter.
exampleTrans: 本合約效期一年，此後每年自動續約。

example: Pursuant to section five, all disputes will be resolved under local law.
exampleTrans: 依據第五條，所有爭議將依當地法律解決。

example: Notices sent by registered mail are deemed received within five business days.
exampleTrans: 以掛號郵件寄出的通知視為五個工作天內送達。

example: Both directors must execute the agreement before the funds can be released.
exampleTrans: 兩位董事都必須簽署協議，資金才能撥付。

example: The power of attorney must be notarized before it is submitted to the bank.
exampleTrans: 授權書必須先經過公證才能提交給銀行。

example: The revised delivery schedule was attached to the contract as an addendum.
exampleTrans: 修訂後的交貨時程以附錄形式附於合約之後。

example: Please begin renewal discussions at least sixty days before the expiration of the lease term.
exampleTrans: 請至少在租期屆滿前六十天開始討論續約事宜。

example: The contract states that the courts of Singapore have jurisdiction over any disputes.
exampleTrans: 合約載明任何爭議均由新加坡法院管轄。

example: The new labor statute requires overtime pay for weekend work.
exampleTrans: 新的勞動法規要求週末工作須支付加班費。

example: The merger cannot proceed until it receives regulatory approval.
exampleTrans: 該併購案在獲得監管機關核准前無法進行。

example: Attendance at the annual ethics training is mandatory for all legal staff.
exampleTrans: 所有法務人員都必須參加年度倫理訓練。

example: The agreement prohibits employees from working for competitors for one year.
exampleTrans: 協議禁止員工在一年內為競爭對手工作。

example: The board is expected to ratify the partnership agreement at next week's meeting.
exampleTrans: 董事會預計在下週會議上批准合作協議。

example: The two firms reached a settlement without admitting any wrongdoing.
exampleTrans: 兩家公司在不承認任何過失的情況下達成和解。

example: A dispute over payment terms delayed the signing of the final contract.
exampleTrans: 付款條件的爭議延誤了最終合約的簽署。

example: A neutral third party was brought in to mediate the disagreement between the partners.
exampleTrans: 雙方請來中立的第三方調解合夥人之間的分歧。

example: The insurer refused the claim, citing negligence in maintaining the equipment.
exampleTrans: 保險公司以設備維護疏忽為由拒絕理賠。

example: The contract includes a contingency plan in case the primary supplier fails to deliver.
exampleTrans: 合約包含應變計畫，以防主要供應商無法交貨。

example: All vendors must abide by the code of conduct outlined in the master agreement.
exampleTrans: 所有廠商都必須遵守主約中載明的行為準則。

example: Passengers in business class may board the plane before other travelers.
exampleTrans: 商務艙乘客可以比其他旅客先登機。

example: The cheapest flight includes a four-hour layover in Hong Kong.
exampleTrans: 最便宜的航班包含在香港停留四小時的轉機時間。

example: Please arrive at the gate at least forty minutes before departure.
exampleTrans: 請至少在出發前四十分鐘抵達登機門。

example: The sales team will embark on a two-week tour of clients across Europe.
exampleTrans: 業務團隊將展開為期兩週的歐洲客戶拜訪行程。

example: I made a dinner reservation for eight people at the hotel restaurant.
exampleTrans: 我在飯店餐廳預訂了八人的晚餐座位。

example: Early registration for the conference closes at the end of this month.
exampleTrans: 本次會議的早鳥報名將於本月底截止。

example: Our booth at the exhibition attracted more than five hundred visitors on the first day.
exampleTrans: 我們在展覽的攤位第一天就吸引了超過五百名參觀者。

example: The awards banquet will be held in the grand ballroom on Saturday evening.
exampleTrans: 頒獎宴會將於週六晚間在大宴會廳舉行。

example: A welcome reception for new members starts at six in the lobby lounge.
exampleTrans: 新會員歡迎會將於六點在大廳酒廊開始。

example: A local restaurant will cater the lunch for all workshop participants.
exampleTrans: 一家當地餐廳將為所有工作坊學員承辦午餐。

example: All guests receive a complimentary breakfast and free airport shuttle service.
exampleTrans: 所有房客都可享用免費早餐和免費機場接駁服務。

example: Hotel occupancy in the city rises sharply during the annual film festival.
exampleTrans: 在一年一度的電影節期間，市內飯店的住房率大幅上升。

example: You may store your luggage at the front desk after checking out.
exampleTrans: 退房後您可以將行李寄放在櫃檯。

example: I always request an aisle seat on long international flights.
exampleTrans: 搭長途國際航班時，我總是要求靠走道的座位。

example: Many conference attendees commute from nearby cities by high-speed rail.
exampleTrans: 許多與會者從鄰近城市搭高鐵通勤前來。

example: The train fare to the convention center is covered by your event pass.
exampleTrans: 前往會議中心的火車票價已包含在您的活動通行證內。

example: Remember to keep the receipts for any highway tolls paid during the business trip.
exampleTrans: 記得保留出差期間支付的所有高速公路通行費收據。

example: The car rental counter at the airport is open twenty-four hours a day.
exampleTrans: 機場的租車櫃檯二十四小時營業。

example: A free shuttle runs between the hotel and the exhibition hall every half hour.
exampleTrans: 飯店與展覽館之間每半小時有一班免費接駁車。

example: The conference organizers arranged an optional excursion to the old town.
exampleTrans: 會議主辦單位安排了前往舊城區的自選短途旅行。

example: We had a free afternoon for sightseeing before the closing ceremony.
exampleTrans: 閉幕典禮前，我們有一個自由觀光的下午。

example: She bought souvenirs for her coworkers at the airport gift shop.
exampleTrans: 她在機場禮品店為同事們買了紀念品。

example: Apply for your business visa at least a month before the overseas assignment.
exampleTrans: 請至少在海外任務出發前一個月申請商務簽證。

example: He contacted the embassy after losing his passport during the trip.
exampleTrans: 他在旅途中遺失護照後聯繫了大使館。

example: It is wise to exchange some currency before arriving in a new country.
exampleTrans: 抵達新的國家前先兌換一些當地貨幣是明智之舉。

example: The hotel charges a fee for any cancellation made within forty-eight hours of arrival.
exampleTrans: 在入住前四十八小時內取消訂房，飯店將收取費用。

example: The airline overbooked the flight and offered volunteers a travel credit to take a later one.
exampleTrans: 航空公司超賣了這班機票，並提供旅遊抵用金給自願改搭後班機的乘客。

example: The company covers lodging and meals for all staff attending the training retreat.
exampleTrans: 公司為所有參加訓練營的員工支付住宿和餐飲費用。

example: We chose this hotel for its proximity to the exhibition grounds.
exampleTrans: 我們選擇這家飯店是因為它鄰近展覽場地。

example: The marketing seminar drew participants from across the industry.
exampleTrans: 這場行銷研討會吸引了業界各方的學員參加。

example: A networking session follows the afternoon panel, with light snacks provided.
exampleTrans: 下午座談會後有人脈交流時段，並提供輕食點心。

example: A gala dinner was held to commemorate the company's fiftieth anniversary.
exampleTrans: 公司舉辦了盛大晚宴以紀念成立五十週年。

example: We need to negotiate the terms of the contract before signing.
exampleTrans: 簽約前我們需要協商合約條款。

example: Please send the invoice to the accounting department.
exampleTrans: 請將請款單寄給會計部門。

example: The quarterly report shows a steady increase in sales.
exampleTrans: 季報顯示銷售額穩定成長。

example: The deadline for submitting the proposal is Friday.
exampleTrans: 提案的截止期限是星期五。

example: Your travel itinerary has been attached to this email.
exampleTrans: 您的差旅行程表已附在這封郵件中。

example: The company will reimburse you for all travel expenses.
exampleTrans: 公司會核銷你所有的差旅費用。

example: The merger between the two firms was announced yesterday.
exampleTrans: 兩家公司的合併案於昨日宣布。

example: She works in the procurement department.
exampleTrans: 她在採購部門工作。

example: This appliance comes with a two-year warranty.
exampleTrans: 這台家電附有兩年保固。

example: The shipment will arrive at the warehouse on Monday.
exampleTrans: 這批貨將於週一抵達倉庫。

example: All applicants must submit a resume and cover letter.
exampleTrans: 所有應徵者都必須繳交履歷與求職信。

example: We plan to recruit five engineers this quarter.
exampleTrans: 我們計劃本季招募五名工程師。

example: She received a promotion to regional manager.
exampleTrans: 她升任區域經理。

example: Annual revenue grew by 15 percent last year.
exampleTrans: 去年年營收成長了 15%。

example: The finance team is reviewing marketing expenditures.
exampleTrans: 財務團隊正在檢視行銷支出。

example: The corporation has subsidiaries in twelve countries.
exampleTrans: 該企業在十二個國家設有子公司。

example: All procedures must be in compliance with safety regulations.
exampleTrans: 所有流程都必須符合安全法規。

example: The first item on the agenda is the budget review.
exampleTrans: 議程的第一項是預算審查。

example: Could you take the minutes for today's meeting?
exampleTrans: 你可以負責今天會議的紀錄嗎？

example: The conference venue can accommodate 500 people.
exampleTrans: 這個會議場地可容納五百人。

example: Customers may request a full refund within 30 days.
exampleTrans: 顧客可在三十天內要求全額退款。

example: The defective items were returned to the manufacturer.
exampleTrans: 瑕疵品已退回製造商。

example: The store conducts an inventory check every month.
exampleTrans: 這家店每個月進行一次庫存盤點。

example: Please ask your supervisor to approve the request.
exampleTrans: 請你的主管核准這項申請。

example: My colleagues and I are working on the new campaign.
exampleTrans: 我和同事們正在進行新的行銷活動。

example: The office lease expires at the end of the year.
exampleTrans: 辦公室租約在年底到期。

example: An amendment to the contract was proposed by the client.
exampleTrans: 客戶提出了一項合約修訂。

example: The sales forecast for next quarter looks promising.
exampleTrans: 下一季的銷售預測看起來很樂觀。

example: The documents were sent by courier this morning.
exampleTrans: 文件今天早上已由快遞寄出。

example: We will do our best to accommodate your schedule.
exampleTrans: 我們會盡力配合您的時間安排。
